---
title: "utils.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\utils.py"
loc: 65
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.85
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `utils.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on load_config, safe_read_json, sanitize_query, SovereignUtils, load_config, safe_read_json, sanitize_query, input_with_timeout, _read, atomic_jsonl_append, _read_json_file. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via load_config, safe_read_json, sanitize_query, SovereignUtils, load_config, safe_read_json, sanitize_query, input_with_timeout, _read, atomic_jsonl_append, _read_json_file. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 33 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [queue](file://queue)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [threading](file://threading)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [msvcrt](file://msvcrt)

### Exports
- `load_config`
- `safe_read_json`
- `sanitize_query`
- `SovereignUtils`
- `load_config`
- `safe_read_json`
- `sanitize_query`
- `input_with_timeout`
- `_read`
- `atomic_jsonl_append`
- `_read_json_file`
